description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a dark brown top and base, contrasted by lighter-colored sides and shelving surfaces. The front features multiple open shelves of varying heights and widths, as well as a single drawer and a closed compartment with a door, both located in the lower section. The sides and back are solid, providing structural support and a clean, finished appearance. The open shelves are designed for easy access and display, while the drawer and door offer concealed storage. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with possible metal or plastic hardware for the drawer and door mechanisms.
description: A tall, modern shelving unit with open shelves, a drawer, and a closed compartment, featuring a dark top and base with lighter sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple open shelves, a drawer, and a closed compartment with a door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, light-colored panel with no visible shelves or compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid, light-colored panel.
